ab: dusa’ cak tama takna tantungu han tamaSai’.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的Sai叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: taqu’an cam cia tu, “mutuszoq qa tatavi ka.”
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: matu matas’i naip tatavi ka, minihan daza’ tatavi muqalqal.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: madas sa tama ki titi’qanvang cin pinung ispaska’ ’i tamaSai’.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給Sai'叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: dusa’ cak ki tamaSai’ ihan palan pababazbaz, madia’ cia ka sintaqu paliqabasan.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: matu namudanin cak ka, tupa ka tamaSai’ tu" taldaqvasin cak ka mintalmindukin.
ch: 我要離開前，Sai叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: tupa cak tu, “maca mincialin na bantac ci tamaSai’ ’a, tantungu han lumaq nam.”
ch: 我說：「等Sai'叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
